title: 别再让 AI Agent 乱读规则了：我做了一个可路由的项目 Skill 架构
content: This article explains a “skill‑based architecture” for organizing AI agent rules. It replaces monolithic rule files with a folder structure that includes SKILL.md, routing.yaml, rules/, workflows/, references/, and docs/. The routing.yaml is the single source of truth for task routes, while descriptions activate skills. Validation scripts detect drift and missing references. An upstream update workflow allows structural changes without overwriting downstream project rules. The result is a maintainable, testable system for AI agent guidance.

title: Claude Desktop 里的 DeepSeek API 该怎么设置？
content: In Claude Desktop’s developer settings, a DeepSeek API was added and initially worked. However, an error now appears: “Invalid custom3p enterprise config: inferenceModels: configured model 'deepseek-v4-pro' is not an Anthropic model.” The message indicates that only Anthropic models are acceptable for gateway deployments. Thus, the DeepSeek model name must reference an Anthropic model (e.g., claude‑sonnet‑4‑5) or a Gateway‑model route that points to an Anthropic model; names like “claude‑deepseek‑v4‑pro” still do not satisfy this requirement.

title: 杨植麟现身后，Kimi又融资140亿
content: Kimi, a Chinese AI startup, is about to raise $2 billion (≈¥140 bn) in a new round led by Meituan’s Longju, bringing its post‑money valuation above $20 billion (≈¥140 bn). The company has now raised over ¥376 bn and its annual recurring revenue surpassed $100 m, driven by paid subscriptions and API usage. Kimi’s K2.6 model— a 1‑trillion‑parameter MoE system— outperforms competing closed‑source models and supports long‑term coding and agent clusters. The funding marks a major milestone for China’s largest‑financed large‑model firm.

title: 他用DeepSeek-V4手搓Agent，冲上GitHub热榜第一
content: DeepSeek‑TUI, an open‑source terminal AI agent built on DeepSeek‑V4, surged to GitHub’s top list with 10.2k stars. Developed by non‑programmer Hunter Bown, it lets users chat, edit files, run shell commands, and manage Git directly in a terminal UI, supporting sub‑agents, LLM inference, and extensive tool integration. The project features automated mode selection, multi‑level reasoning, real‑time LLM streaming, and long‑context handling, appealing to developers seeking low‑cost, customizable AI coding workflows.

title: 小米手机跌出前五，出货量下滑19%，汽车业务成「罪魁祸首」？
content: Xiaomi slipped out of the top five smartphones, with Q1 sales down 19% amid a 6% market decline. The drop is linked mainly to rising storage costs that hurt its low‑end devices, while its flagship line remains competitive. Xiaomi’s extensive focus on its automotive venture has also diverted marketing resources, but the core issue is cost pressure rather than cannibalisation. The company now aims to strengthen its auto and AI businesses to offset mobile sales, targeting higher profit margins.

content: Iran’s oil crisis is strangling supply, creating a “plastic shock” across Asia as short‑term shortages drive demand for alternative materials. The disruption has prompted grain traders to pull back from already over‑saturated markets, while higher petrol prices are slowing new vehicle registrations in China and other countries. The crisis underscores Indonesia’s dependence on imported oil, as its market is set to experience a significant surge in oil import demand.

title: 为什么服务端应用一定要长在浏览器里？试试基于 SSH 开发“永不断线”的终端应用
content: The article argues that for low‑latency, stable server applications, using an SSH‑based terminal can be better than a browser. It introduces **tsshd**, a tool similar to *mosh* that runs over UDP (KCP/QUIC) to avoid drops, support roaming, and provide low‑delay interaction. Built in Go, it offers features like auto‑reconnect, cross‑platform support, port forwarding, and UDP tunneling, making it suitable for AI assistants, monitoring dashboards, and intranet traversal. It presents tsshd as a versatile replacement for web UIs.

title: 我连续 30 天每天凌晨 4:30 起床——以下是那些没人告诉你的真相
content: The article recounts a 30‑day experiment waking at 4:30 a.m. and its impact on productivity, physiology, and mindset. It details a routine—no phone, water, a 4 °C cold‑water bath, light exercise, black coffee after 45 minutes, then 2–3 hours of deep work—supported by research on cortisol, dopamine, and cognitive benefits. The writer notes initial hardship, gradual habit formation, improved sleep quality, and increased self‑confidence, concluding the practice is worthwhile for those who can commit to early bedtime.

title: Validating agentic behavior when “correct” isn’t deterministic
content: Traditional CI tests assume deterministic code, which fails for autonomous agents like GitHub Copilot’s Agent Mode that navigate UI environments. Small timing or rendering changes cause false negatives, making pipelines brittle. The proposed solution builds a “Trust Layer” that learns acceptable behavior from 2–10 successful runs, constructs a graph of states (Prefix Tree Acceptor), merges equivalent states using visual metrics and LLMs, and applies dominator analysis to isolate essential milestones. New runs are validated against this skeleton; only skipped or reordered critical states trigger failures, offering explainable, robust agent testing.

title: 传 DeepSeek 获国家大基金洽谈领投 估值达 450 亿美元
content: Reports indicate that China’s national integrated circuit investment fund is negotiating to lead DeepSeek’s next funding round, potentially valuing the AI startup at about $45 billion. Tencent and other investors are also in talks, though the final investor list remains undecided. Despite its lack of commercial products, investors believe in DeepSeek’s promise; its valuation has jumped from $20 billion, and it ranks among China’s top AI coding platforms. The fund, which has already invested in semiconductor firms like SMIC and Yangtze Memory, continues to focus on semiconductor technology and materials.

title: 月之暗面将完成 20 亿美元新融资，估值破 200 亿美元
content: Kimi, a large‑model startup, is set to close a new $2 billion funding round led by Meituan’s Longzhu, with participation from China Mobile and CPE. Longzhu alone invested over $200 million. The company has raised more than $3.9 billion in under six months, after earlier rounds of $500 million, $700 million, and $700 million. Its post‑money valuation now exceeds $20 billion, quadrupling from $4.3 billion last November, making it the most funded large‑model firm to date.

title: Stop Letting AI Write Your Database Migrations
content: AI-generated database migrations lack context about traffic, locking, and deployment, leading to costly production failures. A simple column addition can lock entire tables, cause timeouts, and introduce data corruption if executed without careful staging. Human‑crafted migrations add columns as nullable, set defaults, update data in batches, and apply NOT NULL later—reducing lock time and avoiding downtime. Use AI only for drafting, then rigorously review and test migrations on realistic datasets before deployment.

title: 旧金山街头的垃圾桶为何高达两万美元一个？ | 原文
content: In 2018, San Francisco’s Department of Public Works decided to replace over 3,000 aging street trash cans. The old green metal cans, used for nearly 20 years, had structural and security problems, were vandalised, and often carried more litter on the outside than inside. The replacement project spanned almost a decade and cost taxpayers more than $55 000. The new cans were first installed in April, but a full rollout would still fall short of the entire fleet.
